analysis.summary: The technician connected to a client computer, which displayed the Windows lock screen. They scrolled through some default lock screen content, briefly brought up the login prompt for the user 'Workman', but then the system reverted to the lock screen before any credentials could be entered or work could begin. The session ended shortly after without the technician successfully logging in.
